title: Azhaipaayum Lyrics Irumbu Kuthirai Song lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Azhaipaayum
Music: G.V.Prakash Kumar
Singer(s): Vijay Prakash, Adrea Jeremiah
Lyrics: Thamarai
Movie: Irumbu Kudhirai

Azhaipaayum paarvai ondru..
Golusilla kaalgal rendu..
Urasadha thozhgal kondu..
Ennai kolludhea..

Mudhal naalil edho edho
Peasa Peasa thondrum..
Mudiyaamal thikki thikki 
vaarthai poi varum..

Mugamellam vervai
mottu etti etti paarkum..
Mudhal kadhal endraal
Idhu than nerum..
oh... oh....

Munpinnal unpol oru pennodu
ondragavea engeayum 
sendrenillai arivaaiya..

kann paarthu naan peasanum..
kai korthu ulavanum..
En thozhil nee saayanum..
azhagea......

Aniyum udayum..
Thadavum vaasam
Enmeal padum dhooram dhaan..

Unakkum manadhil
salanam varudha..??
Varanum endraalum
enna seiyanum..
oh.... oh.....

Kann melea kalabamo..
Enmelea ulaavumo..
En indha pen mogamo
enaku...

Nee nirkum therasulea..
naan vaithen nilavinai..
nee keelea nila adhu
melea..

puruvam irandum
valayum idathil..
puthayil irundhaalum
poi illai..
oh..... oh.... oh......

Azhaipaayum paarvai ondru..
Golusilla kaalgal rendu..
Urasadha thozhgal kondu..
Ennai kolludhea..

Mudhal naalil edho edho
Peasa Peasa thondrum..
Mudiyaamal thikki thikki 
vaarthai poi varum..

Mugamellam vervai
mottu etti etti paarkum..
Mudhal kadhal endraal
Idhu than nerum..
oh... oh....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Azhaipaayum?

The song Azhaipaayum expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional turmoil of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie Irumbu Kudhirai?

In Irumbu Kudhirai, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Azhaipaayum?

The song is beautifully sung by Andrea Jeremiah and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Azhaipaayum was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was Azhaipaayum released?

The song was released on August 7, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Azhaipaayum from Irumbu Kudhirai beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning. It showcases the emotional journey of the characters as they navigate their romantic relationship. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its captivating duet, the song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Azhaipaayum from the movie Irumbu Kudhirai, where the soulful voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Vijay Prakash blend beautifully with GV Prakash Kumar's captivating music. This duet captures the essence of romance and longing, making it a perfect addition to your playlist. Dive into the emotional depths of this song that resonates with love and nostalgia.
stanzaMeanings: A beautiful gaze is there.. Two legs are not still.. With the touch of love.. Are you going to take me away.. On the first day, something is said.. Words come without being able to stop..
The face looks at me with a smile.. If this is the first love, then this is the right time.. oh... oh.... In the past, I never went anywhere with a girl like you..
I look at you and speak.. Holding hands and being together.. Your work is to be my beauty.. Aniyum udayum.. The distance that sings on me is far away..
Is there a year of longing in your heart too?? If it comes, what should I do.. oh.... oh..... Is there a shadow on my eyes.. Is there a glow on me.. This girl is a dream for me...
You are standing in the light.. I have placed the moonlight.. You are below, the moon is above..
With a beautiful smile, the heart becomes calm.. Like a golden flower.. Hands dance in the wind..

Even if there are two rings in the past.. Even if it is new, it is not a lie.. oh..... oh.... oh...... A beautiful gaze is there.. Two legs are not still.. With the touch of love.. Are you going to take me away.. On the first day, something is said.. Words come without being able to stop..
The face looks at me with a smile.. If this is the first love, then this is the right time.. oh... oh....
